low_rumble.name: low_rumble
low_rumble.prompt: Deep ominous low frequency subterranean rumble, dungeon boss room atmosphere, 2 seconds

suspense_build.name: suspense_build
suspense_build.prompt: Building suspense sting, approaching boss danger in dungeon, ominous low strings rumble, 3 seconds

global_presence.name: global_presence
global_presence.prompt: Extremely subtle dungeon presence atmosphere, barely audible low frequency hum, deep stone resonance, no melody, subliminal, 20 seconds

elemental_magic.name: elemental_magic
elemental_magic.prompt: Magical elemental spell cast, arcane crackle and energy release, dungeon fantasy, 0.35 seconds

heartbeat_low_hp.name: heartbeat_low_hp
heartbeat_low_hp.prompt: Ominous slow single heartbeat thump, low health warning pulse, dungeon horror tension, 0.8 seconds

boss_intro.name: boss_intro
boss_intro.prompt: Cinematic boss encounter intro dramatic orchestral impact hit, dungeon fantasy, powerful swell, 2 seconds
